title: ip6.arpa Reverse-DNS Phishing — wildcard A records on IPv6 reverse zones evade reputation and blocklists
tldr: A commodity phishing operator abuses the `ip6.arpa` reverse-DNS namespace — a zone that by RFC design should only ever hold PTR records — to host malicious hyperlinks that email gateways and URL scanners treat as benign infrastructure plumbing.
